JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAR-23-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. PL. WIT, MAR- GARET HOW, S&E. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL, LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT & 3-DAY NOTICE. JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 28 LEXINGTON ST, S.F, CA. - $2,337.68 RENT & DAMAGES - $520 ATTY FEES - COSTS WVD. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIEBLA, JENNIFER TRISTA RICE, JETHRO BALL, PLIVIA ROSA, EMANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 28 LEXINGTON ST, S.F, CA. $2,337.68 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,857.68, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS WVD.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
